headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Diamondback Energy, Lowers Price Target to $221
summary: Citigroup  analyst Scott Gruber   maintains Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $245 to $221.
